products.title: Graham's Aquaculture Grafted Zeus
products.body_html:
What You See Is What You Get (WYSIWYG).
Mother colony shown for reference in second pic.

Recommended PAR: 300-400
Recommended Flow: Medium-High
Growth Rate: Fast

Background: Our most highly recommended grafted acro. We're know for our collection of grafted acros. Ones that we've acquired grafted, and numerous strains that have developed without intervention in our farm, such as this one. Grafted acros can be quite challenging. Often times the green will be completely dominant, and take over as the coral grows into a colony. RRC Rainbow Splice behaves this way. On other strains the green is non-dominant, and seems transient, sometimes fading away all together. Here's why we love Grafted Zeus; the green and red portion grow at the same rate. Neither seems to behave dominantly. And it's hardy and fast growing. The result... one of few grafted acros that has proven success consistently growing out into colonies with an ideal mix of colors. If you like grafted pieces, you can't go wrong with this one!

products.title: Graham’s Aquaculture Rainbow Hammer
products.body_html:
Beautiful Rainbow Hammer that has maintained it’s colors and grown very well for us in captivity for years.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: POTO Holy Rainbow Hammer
products.body_html:
This is the best colored rainbow hammer we’ve come across. The guys at Pieces of the Ocean agree.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Rainbow Dragonsoul
products.body_html:
A variety of Dragonsoul Indo Gold that will develop more colors than your generic variety. Very good grower in captivity.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Rapunzel Holy Grail Torch
products.body_html:
A gorgeous Holy Grail strain that has a deep emerald base, bright yellow tentalces, with pink tips that are the icing on the cake!

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Super Gold Torch
products.body_html:
One of our favorite Indo Gold Varieties. A fast grower that gets massive heads. Blows away the rather generic looking Indo Golds you’ll see being offered by shops that import wilds.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: The Last Crusade Holy Grail Torch
products.body_html: One of our favorite Holy Grail varieties. Bright green base, deep yellow tentacles, and blue tips. It’s been a good grower in captivity with big healthy heads and super long tentacles.

products.title: TCK Hellfire Torch
products.body_html:
One of the strongest gold colored Indo Gold torches we’ve come across.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Graham’s Aquaculture Mardi Gras Torch
products.body_html:
Our absolute favorite Indo Gold variety and the nicest one we’ve ever come across. It has a bright green mouth with radial striations that continue up the tentacle and turn into a bright gold. With a good updraft flow the tentacles grow to massive lengths. The contrast between the green and gold makes it a very special strain.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: TCK Master Torch
products.body_html:
A very nice Holy Grail strain from TCK corals.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: SVP Blowtorch
products.body_html:
This torch is the closest to a true yellow Euphyllia that we’ve come across. Bright yellow tentacles with green bases, and white tips iconic of blowtorch strains.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Lemon Lime Holy Grail Torch
products.body_html:
A holy grail strain that grows fast and forms massive heads with very long tentacles. Tips are a beautiful teal color. We’ve been growing this one for a long time and it does extremely well in captivity. It tends to out-compete other torches and can smother them with its size.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Graham’s Aquaculture 24k Holy Grail
products.body_html:
Our in house 24k Holy Grail strain. Extremely similar to Coral Cruze 24k, but heads tend to split sooner and form individual branches as opposed to large clusters.

Stock photo, price is per head.

products.title: Coral Cruze 24k HG Torch
products.body_html:
The best known torch in the hobby. Massive heads, super long tentacles, and big purple tips. Mancini lineage to Coral Cruze.

Stock photo, price is per head.

Background: Our most highly recommended grafted acro. We're know for our collection of grafted acros. Ones that we've acquired grafted, and numerous strains that have developed without intervention in our farm, such as this one. Grafted acros can be quite challenging. Often times the green will be completely dominant, and take over as the coral grows into a colony. RRC Rainbow Splice behaves this way. On other strains the green is non-dominant, and seems transient, sometimes fading away all together. Here's why we love Grafted Zeus; the green and red portion grow at the same rate. Neither seems to behave dominantly. And it's hardy and fast growing. The result... one of few grafted acros that has proven success consistently growing out into colonies with an ideal mix of colors. If you like grafted pieces, you can't go wrong with this one!

It's a light hog, give it high PAR and it'll reward you with strong gold, purples, and reds. Produces an incredible amount of mucus if you take it out of the water.
